title: Diageo Launches Free Training Programme for Young Nigerians in Hospitality Industry … Gets LASG Support - FinancialEDGE
description: Diageo, a leading global beverage company, on monday, launched the "Learning for Life" programme in Nigeria, a free training initiative aimed at equipping 250 young Nigerians with practical skills needed to work in the hospitality industry. The programme according to Adebayo Alli, Diageo Managing Director, is designed to address the pressing challenge of youth unemployment
html: Diageo, a leading global beverage company, on monday, launched the “Learning for Life” programme in Nigeria, a free training initiative aimed at equipping 250 young Nigerians with practical skills needed to work in the hospitality industry.
